briefdescription.para: Flag to track physical state.
Timeout value for 5ms.
Timeout value for 100ms.
Timeout value for 1s.
This enumerates the Event Types for HDCP Receiver state machine.
This enumerates the State Types for HDCP Receiver state machine.
This function logs a debug message on behalf of a handler state machine.
This function posts an event to a state machine.
This function starts a state machine's timer.
This function stops a state machine's timer.
This function acts as the re-authentication callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the link failure callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the Ri register update callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the check link state of the handler.
This function enables a receiver state machine.
This function disables a receiver state machine.
This function initiates the computations for a receiver state machine.
This function polls the progress of the computations for a state machine.
This function calculates the SHA-1 Hash value for the Repeater Rx interface.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating valid (TRUE) or invalid (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function writes the KSV List and the BInfo values to the RX DPCD register space and sets the READY bit.
This function updates the Ro'/Ri' register of the state machine.

simplesect.para: This function has to save the value of Ri (in RememberRi) as the macro that converts from a uint16 to a HDCP buffer destroys the original value.

briefdescription.para: This functions handles check the integrity of the link.
This functions reports the failure of link integrity.
This function runs the "disabled" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "unauthenticated" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "computations" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "authenticated" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "link integrity failed" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "physical layer down" state of the receiver state machine.
This function enters a HDCP receiver state.
This function exits a HDCP receiver state.
This function drives a HDCP receiver state machine.
This function processes the events pending on a state machine.
This function converts from a state to a display string.
This function installs callback functions for the given HandlerType:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a HDCP receiver state machine.
This function polls the HDCP receiver module.
This function set the REPEATER bit for the HDCP RX interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the truth value to determine if the repeater bit in the port registers is to be set.

simplesect.para: This function disables and then re-enables the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function resets an HDCP interface.

simplesect.para: This function disables and then re-enables the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function enables a HDCP receive interface.
This function disables a HDCP receive interface.
This function queries an interface to check if is enabled.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating is enabled (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function updates the physical state of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is truth value indicating the status of physical interface.

briefdescription.para: This function set the lane count of an hdcp interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of lanes of the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates downstream ready/ assemble ksv list on an interface.
This function initiates authentication on an interface.
This function queries an interface to check if authentication is in progress.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating in progress (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its been authenticated.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its in the computations state.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its in the wait-for-downstream-ready state.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current encryption stream map.
This function handles a timeout on an HDCP interface.
This function implements the debug display output for receiver instances.
This function copies the V'H0, V'H1, V'H2, V'H3, V'H4, KSVList and BInfo values in the HDCP RX HDCP Instance for Repeater validation .

parameterdescription.para: is the Repeater information in the transmitter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function does the necessary actions to update HDCP after the topology has been set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the RepeaterInfo value int the HDCP RX instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is the pointer to topology information.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the KSVList value(s) in the HDCP RX KSV Fifo register space for the upstream interface to read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is a pointer to the KSV list.
is the number of KSVs in the list.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Depth value in the HDCP RX BStatus/BInfo register space for the upstream interface to read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the DEVICE_COUNT value in the HDCP RX register space for the upstream interface to read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the MAX_CASCADE_EXCEEDED error flag in the HDCP BStatus/BInfo register to indicate a topology error.

detaileddescription.para: Setting the flag indicates a depth of more than (4 - 1).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the MAX_DEVS_EXCEEDED error flag in the HDCP BStatus register to indicate a topology error.

detaileddescription.para: Setting the flag indicates that more than 31 downstream devices are attached.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function set the HDMI_MODE in the BStatus register of the HDMI RX DDC space.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This functions handles check if the encryption status (enable/disable) of the HDCP cipher has changed.
This function runs the "wait for downstream" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "assemble KSV list" state of the receiver state machine.
